action_scenario: walking through an autumn park with leaves on the ground, full-body candid photograph

base.prompt: A photographic, candid, head-and-shoulders portrait of a fictional woman in their forties, of Northern European descent, with short black hair and amber eyes, a relaxed expression. warm afternoon sunlight. a softly lit gray studio backdrop. Realistic skin texture, natural pores, no makeup, no glasses, no jewelry, no text, no watermark, sharp focus on the face. This is a fictional character — do not generate a real or named person.

lookalikes.prompt: A woman in her early 40s with fair skin walking through an autumn park, full of colorful fallen leaves. She has a round face with a softly angled jawline, a short, dark brown bob with a side part, and warm hazel eyes that are slightly upturned. Her nose is aquiline with a narrow bridge, and her lips are full with a distinct cupid's bow. Her cheekbones are high and prominent. She has a neutral expression, looking slightly off-camera. Full-body candid photograph. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.

Full-body candid photograph of a woman in her early 40s, walking through an autumn park with fallen leaves, her face clearly visible. She has fair skin with subtle fine lines, a heart-shaped face with a softer, slightly narrower jawline. Her short, dark brown hair in a slightly tousled pixie cut frames her face. Her eyes are warm hazel, rounder and set closer together than average. Her eyebrows are thicker and have a stronger arch. She has a delicate, upturned nose and full, bow-shaped lips. A faint, gentle closed-mouth smile plays on her face, and her head is tilted slightly to the left. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.

A woman in her early 40s, fair skin, light wrinkles around eyes and mouth, walking through an autumn park with fallen leaves, full-body candid photograph. She has an angular jawline, a short, slightly upturned nose, and full, heart-shaped lips with a hint of a smile. Her eyes are large, round, and hazel, set close together. Her dark brown hair is styled in a sleek, elegant bob that skims her chin, with a high hairline and a prominent forehead. Her eyebrows are thin and gently curved. Her face suggests a mixed heritage. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.

Full body candid photograph of a woman in her 40s, walking through an autumn park with leaves on the ground, soft smile.
